README.md.note: Vinaya has shifted to a Python-backend architecture: keep FastAPI in apps/api and Python engine code in packages/engine/vinaya_engine; do not reintroduce the removed root Next app or Node API server.

apps/api/vinaya_api/repository.py.note: Request reports now persist to data/request-reports.json via UTF-8 JSON; keep RequestReportResponse.model_dump()/model_validate symmetry when changing schema or reads will break.

docs/vinaya-mvp-prd-v0.1.md.note: Current implementation matches MVP core loop (submit request -> generate report -> view detail -> view history) but human review and explicit ledger UI are still missing; keep future work aligned with PRD sections 9 and 10.

apps/api/vinaya_api/schemas.py.note: CreateRequestPayload 必须与前端 POST /api/requests 的 JSON 字段保持一致；缺少 title 会让 requests.create_request 在 payload.title 处抛 AttributeError 并直接导致 500。

apps/api/vinaya_api/services/requests.py.note: 默认已切到 LLM 引擎；若未配置有效 API key，POST /api/requests 会走 main.py 中的异常映射返回 503/502，而不是再静默回退到 mock 规则。仅在显式设置 VINAYA_USE_MOCK_ENGINE=true 时才使用旧规则引擎。

apps/api/vinaya_api/llm.py.note: LLM 设置已改为优先读取 llm-providers.json 中启用且 is_default=true 的 provider，再按 provider.api_key_env 去环境变量取 key；切换模型中心默认 provider 会直接影响 POST /api/requests 的实际推理目标。

apps/api/vinaya_api/services/llm_provide.note: test_llm_provider_connection() 当前用最小 chat/completions 请求做探活，返回 ok/message 给前端展示；401/网络失败都作为业务可见测试结果返回，而不是抛成 500。
